homepage.aboutTitle: Big R's Carpet: Bakersfield's Flooring Choice
aboutText: Big R's Carpet started with a simple goal: to provide Bakersfield with dependable, high-quality flooring services. We're a local team, born and raised right here, and we understand the needs of our community.

We believe in honest work and fair prices. Our approach is straightforward: assess your needs, offer expert advice, and deliver exceptional results. We stand behind our work, ensuring your satisfaction every step of the way.
Bakersfield is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and organizations, because we believe in building a stronger community, one floor at a time.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert carpet installation services for homes and businesses in Bakersfield.
services.description:
Big R's Carpet offers comprehensive carpet installation services, handling everything from selection to final inspection. We understand that selecting the right carpet can be overwhelming, so we offer expert guidance to help you choose the perfect style, color, and material for your space. We consider factors like foot traffic, lifestyle, and budget to ensure you make an informed decision.

Our installation process is meticulous and precise. We start by preparing the subfloor, ensuring it's clean, level, and free of imperfections. We then carefully lay the carpet, paying close attention to seams, edges, and transitions. Our experienced installers use professional-grade tools and techniques to guarantee a smooth, seamless finish that will last for years to come.

We work with all types of carpets, including plush, berber, frieze, and more. Whether you're looking for a cozy, comfortable carpet for your bedrooms or a durable, stain-resistant carpet for your high-traffic areas, we have the perfect solution for you. With Bakersfield's hot summers and mild winters, we can also advise on the best carpet options to withstand the local climate.

faq.question: How long does carpet installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most residential installations can be completed in one to two days.

faq.question: Do you remove old carpet?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer complete carpet removal and disposal services as part of our installation package.

faq.question: What types of carpet do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of carpets, including nylon, polyester, wool, and more. We can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Beautiful and durable hardwood flooring installation for Bakersfield homes.
services.description:
Elevate your Bakersfield home with the timeless elegance of hardwood flooring. Big R's Carpet specializes in the installation of solid and engineered hardwood, offering a variety of wood species, finishes, and styles to complement any décor. Considering Bakersfield's dry climate, we help you select woods and finishes that resist warping and cracking. 

Our experienced team meticulously prepares the subfloor to ensure a level and stable base for your hardwood. We use precise installation techniques to create a seamless and durable floor that will last for generations. We understand the unique challenges of installing hardwood in older Bakersfield homes, such as uneven subfloors and tight spaces, and we have the expertise to overcome these obstacles.

From classic oak to exotic bamboo, we offer a wide selection of hardwood options to suit your taste and budget. We also provide expert advice on hardwood maintenance and care to keep your floors looking their best for years to come. Whether you're renovating a historic home in Oleander-Sunset or building a new home in Seven Oaks, Big R's Carpet has the hardwood flooring solution for you.

faq.question: What is the difference between solid and engineered hardwood?
faq.answer: Solid hardwood is made from a single piece of wood, while engineered hardwood has multiple layers of wood veneer bonded together. Engineered hardwood is more resistant to moisture and temperature changes, making it a good choice for Bakersfield's climate.

faq.question: How do I care for my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping and occasional damp mopping with a pH-neutral cleaner is recommended. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaners.

faq.question: Can hardwood flooring be installed over concrete?
faq.answer: Yes, engineered hardwood can be installed over concrete with a proper moisture barrier.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish laminate flooring installation in Bakersfield.
services.description:
Big R's Carpet offers high-quality laminate flooring installation services, providing a cost-effective and durable alternative to hardwood. Laminate flooring is an excellent choice for Bakersfield homeowners looking to update their floors without breaking the bank. It's resistant to scratches, stains, and fading, making it ideal for active families and pet owners.

We offer a wide variety of laminate styles and colors, mimicking the look of real wood, tile, and stone. Our experienced installers ensure a precise and professional installation, paying close attention to details like seams and transitions. We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation for laminate flooring, and we take extra care to ensure a smooth and level surface.

Laminate flooring is easy to clean and maintain, making it a practical choice for busy Bakersfield lifestyles. Its moisture resistance makes it suitable for kitchens, bathrooms, and other areas prone to spills. Whether you're renovating a rental property or updating your family home, Big R's Carpet has the perfect laminate flooring solution for you.

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While water-resistant, laminate flooring is not completely waterproof. It's important to clean up spills promptly to prevent damage.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, laminate flooring can last for 10-20 years or more.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While DIY installation is possible, professional installation is recommended to ensure a proper and long-lasting result.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable and waterproof vinyl flooring solutions for Bakersfield homes.
services.description:
Big R's Carpet offers a wide range of vinyl flooring options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). Vinyl flooring is a popular choice for Bakersfield homeowners due to its durability, water resistance, and affordability. It's an excellent option for kitchens, bathrooms, laundry rooms, and other areas prone to moisture.

Our experienced installers ensure a precise and professional installation, paying close attention to details like seams and transitions. We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation for vinyl flooring, and we take extra care to ensure a smooth and level surface. With Bakersfield's occasional flooding, vinyl’s water resistance is a key benefit for many homeowners.

We offer a wide variety of vinyl styles and colors, mimicking the look of real wood, tile, and stone. Luxury vinyl plank (LVP) is a particularly popular choice, offering the beauty of hardwood with the durability and water resistance of vinyl. Whether you're renovating a bathroom or updating your entire home, Big R's Carpet has the perfect vinyl flooring solution for you.

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its water resistance.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping and damp mopping with a mild detergent is recommended.

faq.question: What is luxury vinyl plank (LVP)?
faq.answer: Luxury vinyl plank is a type of vinyl flooring that mimics the look of real wood, offering both beauty and durability.

services.name: Tile Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional tile installation services for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description:
Big R's Carpet specializes in professional tile installation services, transforming kitchens, bathrooms, and other spaces with beautiful and durable tile. We understand the importance of proper preparation and precise installation to ensure a long-lasting and visually stunning result. Bakersfield's extreme summer heat makes tile a particularly desirable option for its cooling properties.

Our experienced tile setters work with all types of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, glass, and stone. We offer a wide variety of tile styles, colors, and patterns to suit any taste and budget. From intricate mosaic designs to classic subway tile, we can bring your vision to life.

We pay close attention to details like grout lines, leveling, and sealing to ensure a flawless finish. Our team uses high-quality materials and techniques to create a waterproof and durable surface that will withstand the test of time. Whether you're remodeling a bathroom or installing a new kitchen backsplash, Big R's Carpet has the perfect tile solution for you.

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is a great choice for bathrooms due to its water resistance and durability.

faq.question: How do I clean tile grout?
faq.answer: Use a grout cleaner and a scrub brush to remove dirt and stains from grout lines.

faq.question: Can I install tile over existing tile?
faq.answer: In some cases, tile can be installed over existing tile, but proper preparation and bonding agents are crucial.

services.name: Flooring Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert flooring repair services for all types of flooring.
services.description:
Don't replace your entire floor when you can repair it! Big R's Carpet offers expert flooring repair services for all types of flooring, including carpet, hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile. We understand that accidents happen, and we're here to help you restore your floors to their original beauty.

Our experienced technicians can repair a wide range of flooring issues, including water damage, scratches, stains, loose tiles, and more. We use high-quality materials and techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair. We understand the unique challenges of repairing floors in older Bakersfield homes, and we have the expertise to overcome these obstacles.

Before replacing your entire floor, give Big R's Carpet a call. We'll assess the damage and provide you with an honest and affordable repair solution. We're committed to saving you time and money while restoring the beauty and functionality of your floors.

faq.question: How much does flooring repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of flooring repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. We offer free estimates.

faq.question: Can you match the existing flooring?
faq.answer: Yes, we can typically match existing flooring materials to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency flooring repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency flooring repair services for urgent situations.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Big R's Carpet installed new carpet in my living room and bedrooms. The installers were professional, efficient, and did a fantastic job. The carpet looks great, and the price was very reasonable. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: I had Big R's install hardwood floors in my dining room. The quality of the work was excellent, and the floors look beautiful. There was a slight delay in the project, but they communicated well and made sure I was satisfied with the final result.

reviews.name: Lisa J.
reviews.text: Big R's Carpet installed laminate flooring in my kitchen and bathroom. The floors are durable, easy to clean, and look great. The installation was quick and efficient, and the price was very competitive. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We had Big R's install vinyl flooring in our laundry room. It's perfect! Completely waterproof and looks fantastic. The team was very professional and the installation was quick.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Big R's Carpet did a great job installing new tile in my bathroom. The tile looks beautiful, and the grout lines are perfect. There were a few minor issues during the installation, but they were quickly resolved. Overall, I'm very happy with the result.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Big R's repaired a water-damaged section of my hardwood floor. They matched the wood perfectly, and you can't even tell there was any damage. I was impressed with their professionalism and attention to detail.
